s3.bucket.lifecycleconfig.CfnAbout: Specifies the lifecycle configuration for objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information, see [Object Lifecycle Management](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/object-lifecycle-mgmt.html) in the *Amazon S3 User Guide*.

s3.bucket.lifecycleconfig.Rules.Description: A lifecycle rule for individual objects in an Amazon S3 bucket.
